summary: Added distributed-tracing skill for implementing observability with Jaeger and Tempo. The skill covers trace structure, key components (trace, span, context, tags, logs), Jaeger setup (Kubernetes and Docker Compose), application instrumentation (Python/Flask, Node.js/Express, Go), context propagation, Tempo setup, sampling strategies, trace analysis, best practices, and integration with logging. Includes code examples for instrumentation and configuration templates.
